accountName.description: The name of the account for signin purposes.

accountEmail.description: The email associated with the account.

AuthTypeEnum.title: AuthType Enum
AuthTypeEnum.description: The type of account to retrieve. Allowed values are ActiveDirectory, Vault, and Autodesk.

isCloaked.description: Indicates if a BOM component is cloaked

baseQty.description: A numeric value quantifying a single instance of the Component. For Components with discreet quantities, "1" should always be used. For measured quantities, a positive decimal value can be used. For example, a rod cut to 3.5 feet would have a BaseUOM of "foot" and a BaseQty of "3.5".

baseUOM.description: The Unit of Measure the Component is quantified with. For discreet quantities, "Each" should be used. For measured quantities, a length (inch, cm, foot, etc.) volume (ounce, ml, liter, quart, etc.) or mass (gram, pound, kg, etc.) unit of measure should be used.

uniqueId.description: Unique data within the scope of the design file used to identify the Component. For Inventor files, the GUID used to identify the Component is used (or GUID plus VirtualComponentDefinition._PropertySetsId for Virtual components). For DWG files, the HandleID associated with the Component is used.

xRefId.description: For Components with a XRefType of "external", XRefID represents the FileID of the design file associated with that component. For "internal" Components, XRefID should be set to -1.

BOMLinksAndRevisions.title: BOM Links And Revisions
BOMLinksAndRevisions.description: BOM links and revisions object. Contains BOM related links between Items.

referenceDesignatorsAvailable.description: If true, reference designators are available.

bOMComponents.description: Array of BOM components in this BOM

BOMStructureEnum.title: BOM Structure Enum
BOMStructureEnum.description:
An enumerated value representing the BOMStructure value of Component:

- ``Normal`` - 0,
- ``Purchased`` - 1,
- ``Inseperable`` - 2,
- ``Phantom`` - 3,
- ``Reference`` - 4,
- ``DynamicPhantom`` - 5

id.description: Master Id of this Change Order. The Master Id uniquely identifies this Change Order object

name.description: The descriptive name for this Change Order.The Change Order Number will be used here.

createDate.description: The date and time the Change Order was created

number.description: The Change Order number. Numbers are generated based on the Numbering Scheme.

title.description: The title of the Change Order

description.description: The description of the Change Order.

approveDeadline.description: The date and time when the Change Order needs to be approved by.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last time that the Change Order was modified.

lastTouchedDate.description: the last time that the Change Order was modified.

state.description: Get the name of the Change Order State.

isReadOnly.description: Get if the Change Order is currently locked.

ComponentTypeEnum.title: Component Type Enum
ComponentTypeEnum.description:
An enumerated value specifying the type of component.  Enum of Component Type:

- ``Part`` - 0
- ``Assembly`` - 1
- ``Virtual`` - 2
- ``Standard`` - 3
- ``Purchased`` - 4
- ``Document`` - 5

limit.description: Limit requested for the current search

totalResults.description: Number of total hits. If this value is larger than the objects returned, then multiple searches will have to be performed to get the complete result set.

nextUrl.description: Used to continue a search if the results are too large for a single call. Url has bookmark string embedded for subsequent calls on that search

ECOComment2.title: ECO Comment2
ECOComment2.description: Change Order Comment object duplicate(ECOComment) to allow them to reference to each other

Entity.title: Entity
Entity.description: A generic entity object with all supported fields.

id.description: A unique identifier for the object

fullName.description: The full vault path if Entity is a folder

version.description: Version number if entity is an Iteration object

createDate.description: Tells the date and time that this version of the entity was created in the Vault.

state.description: The name of the life cycle state for the entity

ErrorResponse.title: Error Response

errorCode.description: The vault error code. Client can use it to look up the localized error message

ErrorResponse.description: The format for an error response

FileObject.title: File - we cannot directly use File as class name, as it's occupied.

FileVisualizationAttachmentStatusEnum.title: File Visualization Attachment Status Enum
FileVisualizationAttachmentStatusEnum.description: The design visualization attachment status of the file.

name.description: The name of the file. This value applies to all versions of the file

version.description: The version of the file. A file that has just been added to the Vault, will have 1 as its VerNum

createDate.description: Tells the date and time that this version of the file was created in the Vault. For the first version of a file, this date will match CkInDate. For later versions, this value will have the time when the previous version was checked out.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last modified date of the file. This value is set by the client that uploaded the file.

state.description: The name of the life cycle state for the current file

parentFolderId.description: FolderId of the parent the current file  resides in

isCheckedOut.description: If true, then the latest version of this file is in the checked-out state

createUserName.description: The Name of the user who checked-in or uploaded this file.

checkinDate.description: The date and time that the file was checked in. This property is only valid if isCheckedOut is false.

checkoutDate.description: The date and time that the file was last checked out

checkoutUserName.description: User that has the file checked out

size.description: The size, in bytes, of the file. This property is only valid if CheckedOut is false.

hasVisualizationAttachment.description: Flag to determine if valid VizAttachmentStatus (Not None)

isCloaked.description: Get if this file is cloaked. A cloaked object is one that the caller does not have permissions to view

isOnSite.description: Gets whether or not the file is on the local site (in a multi-site environment). This value will always be true on a single-site environment.

id.description: Get the unique identifier for this folder

name.description: Get the descriptive name for this Folder. This is always the Folder Name without the full path.

fullName.description: Get the full vault path for this folder (ie. $/Folder1)

createDate.description: Get the date and time that the folder was created.

createUserName.description: Get the name of the user who created this folder.

category.description: Get the category that is assigned to this folder

state.description: The name of the life cycle state for the current folder

subfolderCount.description: Get the number of immediate child folders.

isLibrary.description: Get whether or not this folder is a library folder

isReadOnly.description: Get whether this folder can be modified by the logged in user.

isCloaked.description: Get if this folder is cloaked. A cloaked object is one that the caller does not have permissions to view.

Group.title: Group
Group.description: Group object. A group is a collection of users and other groups.

name.description: The unique name of the Group.

createDate.description: The date the Group was created.

emailDL.description: The email address (distribution list) for the Group.

IndexingStatus.title: Indexing Status
IndexingStatus.description:
Indicates the current status of the indexing engine. This status helps users understand whether the indexing operation is complete or still in progress. This is particularly important for customers with large datasets, as indexing can take a considerable amount of time to complete.
The statuses include:

- ``IndexingComplete`` - All properties and content have been indexed.
- ``IndexingProperties`` - File properties are currently being indexed.
- ``IndexingContent`` - File content is currently being indexed.
- ``NA`` - Not applicable as data not retrieved from index.

Note: When the status is either 'IndexingProperties' or 'IndexingContent', the search results are incomplete because the indexes are still being created. Complete search results will be available once fully indexed.

ItemAssociatedFileVersion.title: Item Associated File Version
ItemAssociatedFileVersion.description: Item associated file version object, contains the file version and the association type.

ItemAssociatedFileVersionCollection.title: Item Associated File Version Collection
ItemAssociatedFileVersionCollection.description: Item associated file version collection object, collection of item related files and attachments.

bomComponentId.description: Id of the BOM Component (only valid when BOM row is a component - not assigned an item)

groupedRow.description: Indicates if this BOM association is a grouped row of multiple BOM rows

groupId.description: Id of the Multiple Row grouping

unitSize.description: The unit size for this BOM row

instCount.description: Instance Count of this BOM association

cad.description: Indicates if this BOM row is created and maintained by CAD data or is a manual BOM row

included.description: Indicates if this BOM row is included or excluded from the BOM

refDesId.description: The reference designator ID. This value will be 0 if reference designators are not available.

childHasChildren.description: If true, the child Item has children of its own. If false, the child is a leaf.

bomLinkMasterId.description: Item association's master Id (does not change between iterations)

bomOrder.description: The order that the child entry shows up in the BOM.

units.description: The display name for the Unit of Measure on CldItemUsage.

childItemId.description: The ID of the child Item.

parentItemId.description: The ID of the parent Item.

isStatic.description: If true, the dependency is static. If false, the dependency is computed.

ItemBomOccurrence.title: Item Bom Occurrence
ItemBomOccurrence.description: BOM link master ID with which this occurrence is associated.

rootItemId.description: The top most Item of the BOM.

id.description: A unique identifier for this occurrence within the Item BOM.

parentOccurrenceId.description: The immediate parent. -1 means no parent occurrence.

detailId.description: The value of the occurrence. Also known as the 'Detail Id.'

path.description: The path to the occurrence in the BOM. The format is the list of Item Master IDs separated by the '/' delimiter.

ItemVersion.title: Item Version
ItemVersion.description: The unique identifier for the object.

version.description: The version number, which is a sequential number given to each version. For example, if this value is 5, then the object is the 5th version.

revision.description: The display value for the revision.

state.description: Life cycle state of the item

isCloaked.description: If true, the logged-in user is restricted from seeing this item.

isLatestObsolete.description: Flag to check if an latest Item's  version is obsolete

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Job object. A job is a task that is run by the job processor.

id.description: A unique identifier for the job.

priority.description: The priority of the job. A lower number means a higher priority. 1 is the lowest possible number.

params.description: An array of parameters which provide metadata about the job.

status.description:
The status of the job:

- ``Ready`` - The job is ready to be run.
- ``Running`` - The job is currently running.
- ``Success`` - The job has completed successfully.
- ``Failure`` - The job has failed.

isOnSite.description: In a multi-site environment, this property tells if the file is on the local site.

id.description: Get the unique identifier for this link object

Markup.title: Markup
Markup.description: Markup object. A markup is a visual annotation that is added to a file.

userGroupId.description: User or group id that profile attribute is associated with.

attributeId.description: The id of the current attribute.

value.description: The value of the profile attribute.

attributeName.description: Name of the profile attribute (must be unique).

activeDirectoryMapping.description: Active Directory field the attribute is mapped from (null if not mapped).

propertyDefinitionId.description: Unique identifier for a server-based property definition

value.description: The property value associated with the entity and PropertyDefinition

id.description: Get the unique identifier for a server-based property definition

displayName.description: Get or sets the Display name for this Property Definition

systemName.description: Get the System Name for this Property Definition.

dataType.description: The value defined in SQL database.

active.description: Get or sets whether this Property Definition is Active.

isSystem.description: Get whether or not this is a System Property (as opposed to an userDefined property)

initialValue.description: Default Value that will be applied to entities that do not have an existing value associated with this PropertyDefinition

listValues.description: Array of possible values for properties based on this property definition

RevisionOptionsEnum.title: Revision Options Enum
RevisionOptionsEnum.description:
Revision options:

- ``AllRevision`` - All Revisions
- ``CurrentRevision`` - Current Revision

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Role object. A role is a collection of permissions that can be assigned to users and groups.

id.description: A unique identifier of the role.

systemName.description: The system name of the Role.

description.description: Friendly description of the role's purpose

propertyDefinitionUrl.description: URL string to the property definition

operator.description: Represents the operator used for the search.

searchString.description: The value to use for the search

propertyDefinitionUrl.description: URL string to the property definition

ascending.description: If true, the sort is ascending. If false, the sort is descending.

id.description: A unique number that the Vault uses to reference the user.

name.description: The login name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

createDate.description: The date that the user was created.

roles.description: An array of Role objects associated with this user.

vaults.description: An array of KnowledgeVault objects associated with this user.

groups.description: An array of Group objects the user is a direct member of

Vault.title: Vault
Vault.description: Vault object.Contains information about the Knowledge Vault.

name.description: The name of the Knowledge Vault. This is also the name of the database.

id.description: A unique identifier for the Knowledge Vault.

VersionTypeEnum.title: Version Type Enum
VersionTypeEnum.description: An enumerated value that specifies the type of version to retrieve.

XRefTypeEnum.title: XRef Type Enum
XRefTypeEnum.description:
An enumerated value that specifies whether the Component is internal or external in relation to the design file.

Enum of XRefType
  Internal = 0,
  External = 1

Url.description: The relative URL to access this object.
